summaryPatterns: I'm a Data Scientist (4+ years) who built ML models that increased conversion by 22% and reduced MAE by 15%, with experience in end-to-end pipelines and A/B testing
I'm an ML Engineer (5+ years) specializing in NLP and LLM systems, developed RAG solutions that improved search speed 4x and reduced manual work by 65%
I'm a Senior Data Scientist (3+ years) who led team of 8 engineers, built production models serving 10M+ users daily with 86% accuracy on computer vision tasks
I'm an ML Engineer (6+ years) focused on CV and 3D medical data analysis, deployed models processing hundreds of thousands of scans with distributed training
I'm a Data Scientist (4+ years) who developed pricing models improving forecast accuracy by 22% and recommendation systems increasing campaign launches 5x
achievementPhrases: Increased prediction accuracy by 22% and reduced MAE by 15%
Improved conversion rate by 8% through A/B testing
Reduced manual processing time by 85% with automated pipelines
Achieved 86% mAP@0.5 on object detection tasks
Increased campaign launches from 36 to 140+ per month (5x growth)
Reduced ad-hoc analytics requests by 80% through self-service platform
Improved search speed 4x with hybrid retrieval system
Achieved 95% recall on safety-critical detection models
Reduced response time by 65% with AI agent implementation
Decreased customer complaints by 12% with sentiment analysis
Improved retention by 0.6 percentage points generating 12-15M RUB profit
Reduced infrastructure costs by 30-40% with model optimization
Increased throughput by 30% with mathematical optimization
Achieved ROUGE-L 0.72 on text summarization tasks
Reduced processing time from hours to minutes
Improved model quality metrics by 10-18% through feature engineering
Scaled to serve 10-11M active users daily
Achieved 97% Top-1 accuracy on request classification with 1000+ classes
keyResponsibilities: Design and implement end-to-end ML pipelines from data collection to production deployment
Develop and fine-tune deep learning models for NLP, CV, and tabular data tasks
Build RAG systems and LLM-powered applications for business automation
Conduct A/B testing and statistical analysis to validate model performance
Create feature engineering pipelines and perform exploratory data analysis
Optimize models for production deployment and monitor performance in real-time
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into ML solutions
Implement MLOps practices including versioning, CI/CD, and model monitoring
Research and evaluate new ML techniques and frameworks for business applications
redFlags: no mention of production deployment experience
purely academic projects without industry relevance
notes: ML Engineer/Data Scientist роль требует сочетания глубоких технических навыков в ML/DL и понимания бизнес-процессов. Ключевые особенности сильных резюме: конкретные метрики улучшений (точность, скорость, экономия), опыт полного цикла ML-проектов от исследования до продакшена, владение современными фреймворками (PyTorch, Transformers, LLM), опыт работы с большими данными и распределенными системами. Важно показать не только техническую экспертизу, но и бизнес-результаты: увеличение конверсии, сокращение затрат, автоматизацию процессов. Востребованы специалисты с опытом в NLP/LLM, CV, recommendation systems и MLOps. Обязательно указывать опыт командной работы, менторства и взаимодействия с бизнес-заказчиками.
